summary: Describe the runtime artifact layout used for resumable governance.
rules: The controller status file lives at Codex_Skill_Runtime/SkillsManager-Python-SubAgentGov/controller_status.json.
Each target skill owns one runtime subdirectory named after the skill under Codex_Skill_Runtime/SkillsManager-Python-SubAgentGov/.
Each runtime subdirectory stores prompt.md, codex.jsonl, last_message.txt, exit_code.txt, state.txt, result.json, result.md, closure.json, and tmp/.
closure.json is the completion witness for the full per-skill governance loop, not merely the subagent run.
